text_style_rules: Russian performance promo copy about payments, banks, checkout, conversion, payment links and methods. Keep headline 2-6 words.
image_style_rules: Modern fintech promo visual: clean payment UI cues, cards, bank/payment icons, bright commercial polish. Illustration/icons are separate layers.
composition_rules: Use composer pipeline with separate text, payment illustration/icon layer and background. Prioritize readability and product clarity.
negative_rules: Do not generate Cyrillic text inside AI image. Avoid fake bank interfaces, tiny unreadable text, random payment logos and overloaded icon clutter.
asset_rules: Prefer saved Pay backgrounds, payment icon overlays, brand colors, logo zones and reusable ad templates. Keep layers stable during isolated revisions.
telegram_examples: для монополии пэй нужна новая картинка с текстом Яндекс-Яндекс
quality_check_rules: payment illustration layer exists or placeholder warning exists
AI does not own final Cyrillic text
